system.description: When someone isn’t paying attention to either you or their surroundings, you can say “Wait! Stop!” and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
describe how the target stepped into danger (a knife, an open set of jaws, a moving train) that was already there. It may deal up to 1 Harm to the target.

If the target dies due to this effect, the loss empowers you. Mark one box on the Playwall R1 track. At any time, you can erase a mark to add 1 Harm to the damage you deal with this Ability. Erase a full 10 marks to activate UNL3ASH.
outcomes.every3rd3: you may describe how the danger also causes a non-Harm-related catastrophe to the target or their surroundings.
outcomes.failure: your confidence sets you up. The target was prepared for what you were attempting and Harms you instead.
